title: CAU Imphal ORDINANCE 2 of 1996
text: GOVERNMENT OF INDIA MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE DEPAI: FMENT OF AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH AND EDUCATION . Central Agricultural University, Imphal (Manipur) ORDINANCE Imphal, the 13th April, 1996 No. 2 of 1996 No. VC/CAU/14(ESTABLIS)/93: Whereas the approval of Expenditure Finance Committee Memo along with addendum in respect of the sanction of the Central Agricultural University scheme under the VIllth five Year Plan_ as communicated hti the Joint Secretary, Department or Agricultural Research and Education and Secretary, Indian Council . of AgricultUral Research vide their letter number 1(2) 92-Pl&M( Part-111), dated the 13th October, 1993 provides for the establishment of a College of Fisheries in Tripura as a constituent college of the Central Agricultural University. Imphal: And whereas the Government of Tripura has transferred the land measuring 44.30 acres at Lembuchera near Agartala to the Central Agricultural University for the establishment of the College of Fisheries vide order number F.34(6)-Per/89 dated the 9th January, 1996: And whereas the Government of India in the Department of Agricultural Research .and Education/Indian - Council of Agricultural Research has approved the making of the first Ordinance regarding the.establishment and management of the College of Fisheries at Lembuchera in Tripura vide its letter F.No.42,10/94-Edn. IV dated the 8th April, 1996. Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) read With clause (k); (o).and (2) of sub-section (1') of section 27 of the Central Agricultural University Act, 1992 (No. 40 of 1992), and with previous approval of the central Government, as mentioned in para 3 above, I, the Vice-Chancellor of the Central 4 . (Vij -- 1 of 4 -- Total 2 3 Agricultural I 'niversity, Imphal, do, hereby make the first Ordinance and notify the following provisions for the establishment and management of the Cu lege of Fisheries at Lembuchera in Tripura, namely: I There shall he a college of Fisheries (hereinafter referred to as the said college), at Lernbuchera in Tripura which shall he a constituent college of the Central Agricultural University, Imphal. The said colleae shall he managed as per the Statutes and Ordinances of the Central .Agricultural .University and the regulations made by the authorities of the Central Agricultural University, from time to time. ;.
